ops.text: TestShipLiveGT (and likely any live-gt test isolating HOME to t.TempDir) flakes ~1/3 runs with `TempDir RemoveAll cleanup: unlinkat .../Homebrew/bootsnap/.../compile-cache-iseq: directory not empty` — gt 1.8.6 spawns a background subprocess that writes a bootsnap compile cache under the isolated $HOME while t.TempDir() cleanup races it. Bisected by a P2c lane on 2026-07-24: reproduces on the pre-existing 2-leg version at HEAD~1, so not introduced by the gt-native diff. Possible fixes: point gt's cache elsewhere via env (XDG_CACHE_HOME to a dir outside TempDir), or retry/ignore the cleanup error shape in the live-test harness.
